title: murdannia gardneri
intro: Murdannia gardneri, also known as blue river grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Murdannia gardneri include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Murdannia gardneri can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions.
